title: Salt and Pepper Shakers Set, 2 Pcs Salt and Pepper Shakers Sets, Small Black and White Salt Shaker, Salt and Pepper Pots Salt Dispenser for Kitchen, BBQ, Camping, Restaurant, Dining Table
features: Salt and Pepper Sets -The vintage black and white salt and pepper set includes two glass bottles, accessories with 4 stainless steel caps, 1 cleaning brush, and 1 funnel. Exquisite packaging makes item into a perfect gift for Mother’s Day, wedding gifts, Thanksgiving day gifts and Christmas gifts etc.

Easy to clean - When you clean the salt and pepper shakers Set, simply unscrew the lid for quick and easy cleaning and rinsing (please note that salt and pepper shakers can only be washed by hand and not in the dishwasher).
Smooth Dispensing - The evenly distributed 13 small holes allow you to precisely control the amount of salt or pepper added to the dish. No more over-seasoned and spoilt dinners.

No Mix-Ups - Set of 2 salt shaker set printed with “Salt” and “Pepper” can be used to hold sea salt and black pepper separately, and you’ll always know which one's pepper and which one's salt with these glass salt and pepper.

Ideal for Daily Use - Each shaker holds approximately 2.7 ounces, making it the perfect condiment shaker for cooking and table side use. These shakers are a great addition to any dining table, from everyday dining to picnic, breakfast bar, backyard BBQ.
description: Product Description Farmhouse salt and pepper shaker set. Add a stylish touch to your table setting with our lovely salt and pepper shakers. Features of salt and pepper shaker set. Product Size: Each salt and pepper shaker is approximately 1.57in x 1.57in x 3.54in. Color: Black and white salt and pepper shakers. Material: High quality glass and high quality stainless steel lid. Paint: Salt and pepper shakers are made with water-based paint on the outside and no paint on the inside of the bottle. To clean, simply unscrew the lid for quick and easy cleaning and rinsing (please note that salt and pepper shakers can only be washed by hand and not in the dishwasher). Salt and pepper shaker giveaways：Two stainless steel lids (spare kit), a small brush, and a folding funnel. The salt and pepper shakers set functional and decorative and make a great addition to any dining table, breakfast bar, restaurant or kitchen counter. Cooking will be a breeze with salt & pepper shakers close at hand, and these will look great when placed on the table for dinner parties or holiday occasions.
